ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the employee's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee's address */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the employee works for */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee is assigned to */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the employee is part of */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title (foreign key to job_titles table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "ceo_email" TEXT /* Email address of the CEO */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "stock_ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (if the company is publicly traded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the business unit belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the business unit */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the business unit */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_units_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job title */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" TEXT /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the evaluator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in overall performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee record being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the record */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
